category.scope_note: Portable lithium battery cells, battery packs, and power banks (China export to Mauritius) compliance gap comparison.

title.en: China-to-Mauritius Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入毛里求斯：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入模里西斯：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China lithium battery and power bank documentation against Mauritius requirements: Mauritius Standards Bureau (MSB) conformity where in scope, MS/IEC 62133 cell safety, ICTA approval for wireless-enabled devices, UN 38.3 transport, and in-country importer obligations. Mauritius has no EU-style horizontal battery regulation or RoHS regime.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国锂电池/移动电源合规文件与毛里求斯要求对照：毛里求斯标准局（MSB）在适用范围内的合格评定、MS/IEC 62133电芯安全、含无线功能设备的ICTA核准、UN 38.3运输及在地进口商义务。毛里求斯没有欧盟式的横向电池法规或RoHS制度。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鋰電池/行動電源合規文件與模里西斯要求對照：模里西斯標準局（MSB）在適用範圍內的合格評定、MS/IEC 62133電芯安全、含無線功能裝置的ICTA核准、UN 38.3運輸及在地進口商義務。模里西斯沒有歐盟式的橫向電池法規或RoHS制度。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal and technical advisors before export. This page does not constitute a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body determination, customs determination, or market-access approval.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规随时变化，出口前请向具备资质的法律及技术顾问核实所有要求。本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規隨時變化，出口前請向具備資質的法律及技術顧問核實所有要求。本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: Chinese lithium battery and power bank exporters selling to Mauritius should align cell safety to MS/IEC 62133, plan for Mauritius Standards Bureau (MSB) conformity and import inspection where the product is in a regulated scope, obtain ICTA approval for any wireless-enabled device, hold UN 38.3 transport test results for shipping, and act through an in-country importer — none of which are automatically satisfied by Chinese GB 31241 or CCC certification. Mauritius does not operate an EU-style horizontal battery regulation or RoHS regime.
answer_first.zh: 向毛里求斯销售的中国锂电池及移动电源出口商，应使电芯安全与MS/IEC 62133一致，在产品属于受监管范围时规划毛里求斯标准局（MSB）合格评定及进口检验，对含无线功能的设备取得ICTA核准，为运输持有UN 38.3测试结果，并通过在地进口商运作——上述要求均无法由中国GB 31241或CCC认证自动满足。毛里求斯不实行欧盟式的横向电池法规或RoHS制度。
answer_first.zht: 向模里西斯銷售的中國鋰電池及行動電源出口商，應使電芯安全與MS/IEC 62133一致，在產品屬於受監管範圍時規劃模里西斯標準局（MSB）合格評定及進口檢驗，對含無線功能的裝置取得ICTA核准，為運輸持有UN 38.3測試結果，並透過在地進口商運作——上述要求均無法由中國GB 31241或CCC認證自動滿足。模里西斯不實行歐盟式的橫向電池法規或RoHS制度。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly, or upon a material regulatory change in Mauritius (MSB, ICTA) or China (GB) source documents
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set true. Official regulator, standards body, or primary legal sources preferred (msb.intnet.mu, icta.mu, unece.org, iec.ch, or equivalent authority). Local PDFs are not accepted.
